page.title: Settings
page.description: Manage workspace, brand, members, and account security.

language.title: Language
language.label: Interface language
language.hint: Language changes take effect immediately and are saved to local storage.

brand.title: Brand Customization
brand.hint: Uploaded logo is saved to file storage first, then written to brand settings.
brand.tooLarge: Logo must be smaller than 5 MB

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.slackDescription: Push heat alerts to a Slack channel
integrations.hubspotDescription: Sync contacts and access events to CRM
integrations.emailNotificationsDescription: Receive email alerts when your shared links show high intent
integrations.emailNotificationsSaveFailed: Failed to save email notification preference

security.title: Security
security.forceEmailVerificationDescription: Require email verification before accessing links
security.watermarkDownloadsDescription: Add visitor email watermark when downloading PDFs
security.auditLogDescription: Review key workspace actions from the last 30 days.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Manage visitor data subject rights: export, anonymize, or delete PII.
compliance.visitorEmailHint: Enter the email address used by the visitor to access your shared links or deal rooms.
compliance.anonymizeConfirm: This will replace the visitor's email and clear IP addresses across all logs. Continue?
compliance.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete all identifiable records for this visitor. This action cannot be undone.
